zh.Whalesborough, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Bodrugan於大約1310年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Otto de Bodrugan21歲，母親Margaret Champernon22歲。她於1328年與Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年6月5日在英國享年40歲。

zh-hans.Whalesborough, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾華阿萊斯波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Bodrugan于大约1310年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Otto de Bodrugan21岁，母亲Margaret Champernon22岁。她于1328年与Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年6月5日在英国享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Bodrugan was born about 1310, in Cornwall, England, her father, Otto de Bodrugan, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Champernon, was 22. She married Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight in 1328, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 June 1349, in England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Bodrugan est née environ 1310, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Otto de Bodrugan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Champernon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight en 1328, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1349, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Bodrugan um 1310 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto de Bodrugan 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret Champernon 22. Sie hat 1328 in Cornwall, England Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Juni 1349 im Alter von 40 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Bodrugan è nata il circa 1310 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Otto de Bodrugan, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margaret Champernon, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight nel 1328, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 giugno 1349, nel England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Lancarffe, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Bodruganが約1310年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Otto de Bodruganは21歳，母Margaret Champernonは22歳であった。1328年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John De Walesbreu , Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年6月5日にイギリスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Bodrugan(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto de Bodrugan(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Champernon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 6월 5일 영국에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Bodrugan nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Otto de Bodrugan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Champernon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight em 1328, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1349, em Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Bodrugan родилась около 1310 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Otto de Bodrugan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Champernon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight в 1328 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 июня 1349 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Bodrugan nació aproximadamente 1310, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Otto de Bodrugan, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Champernon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir John De Walesbreu , Knight en 1328, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 5 de junio de 1349, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
